runtime_owned_skills.do: Harness-level Do is owned by the future Pi runtime extension, not distributed as a normal skill.
runtime_owned_skills.done: Done is a Pi runtime completion outcome, not a normal skill.
runtime_owned_skills.escalate: Escalation is a Pi runtime blocker outcome, not a normal skill.

wrapper_pending_skills.auto: Requires a Pi-aware wrapper that calls Harness-level Do.
wrapper_pending_skills.babysit-pr: Requires a Pi-aware wrapper that calls Harness-level Do.
